results.evidence: ErrorCard.tsx CATEGORY_CONFIG has model_not_found with magnifying glass icon and red color
classifyErrorClient.ts:16 returns exact hint text specified in AC
shared/classifiedError.ts exists with model_not_found in category union, matches backend error-classifier.ts
ErrorCard.tsx re-exports ClassifiedError via export type from shared — existing imports unchanged
TestsPanel.tsx:233 changed from onRetry={handleGenerateEvals} to onRetry={() => handleGenerateEvals()}
WorkspaceContext.tsx sanitizeTestType() returns undefined for non-string values, 8 tests verify
sanitizeTestType returns 'unit'/'integration' unchanged, verified by tests
safeStringify in sse.ts catches circular refs, falls back to WeakSet replacer; client never crashes
safeStringify:19 logs to console.error on catch; no internal details in UI
Both useSSE.start() and useMultiSSE.startCase() now use safeStringify(body) instead of JSON.stringify
safeStringify tries JSON.stringify first — happy path identical to before
SkillWorkspace.tsx raw div replaced with ErrorCard + classifyErrorClient
ErrorCard receives onDismiss that dispatches SET_ERROR null
classifyErrorClient.ts maps rate_limit, auth, timeout, model_not_found patterns; unknown fallback
ErrorBoundary wraps panel content; DetailHeader and TabBar remain outside
ErrorBoundary.tsx:28-39 renders 'Something went wrong' + Reload button
ErrorBoundary.tsx:20 console.error with error and componentStack
ErrorBoundary key={plugin/skill} causes remount on skill switch

findings.title: ErrorCard export before import (style)
findings.issue: export type precedes import type for the same symbol — unconventional ordering
findings.suggestion: Move import above export for conventional ordering
findings.impact: No functional impact; minor code readability
